race.comment: SOUTHAMPTON NICCO (4) turned in a nice effort to score two runs ago at Beaudesert. Safely held last time out when seventh over 1000m at Gold Coast, beaten 6 lengths. Finds the right race this time and can get the job done. SNITZOND (2) lines up for the first time since April 5. Looking to emulate his win at Toowoomba to kick off the last campaign. Has switched to the Nick Keal stable. Capable of playing a major role. TAYLOR'S RAGE (8) is ticking along okay with two runs this time in. Improved last time out when fifth, beaten 3.5 lengths, at Goondiwindi over 1000m. Blinkers come off. Expected to be competitive. LA NARRADORA (6) didn't make an impact at her last run before going for a spell on February 19, finishing ninth and beaten 4.5 lengths over 1181m at Grafton. Makes plenty of appeal.
